name: Spicy Mango Ketchup (Gr)
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and onions, and sweat until translucent.
3. Add the remaining ingredients: rice wine vinegar, ketchup, brown sugar, chipotle puree, ground ginger, ground cinnamon, and ground cloves.
4. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Puree the mixture and store in the refrigerator. This recipe can be made up to one week in advance and stored in the refrigerator.
Yield: 1 quart
